title: Tab size small
code:
<gds-card width="100%" variant="neutral-02"> 
 <gds-tabs>
    <gds-tab slot="tab" size="small">Account details</gds-tab>
    <gds-tab slot="tab" selected="" size="small">Transactions</gds-tab>
    <gds-tab slot="tab" size="small">Documents</gds-tab>
    <gds-tab-panel>Account details</gds-tab-panel>
    <gds-tab-panel>Transactions</gds-tab-panel>
    <gds-tab-panel>Documents</gds-tab-panel>
  </gds-tabs>
  </gds-card>
